Dear Sir, 
 
Sub.: Transcript of Conference call with Analysts / Investors on Financial Results for the 
quarter ended 30th June, 2024 
 
In continuation of our letter dated 18-Jul-24 and pursuant to Regulation 30(6) of the SEBI (Listing 
Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, Transcript of Conference call with 
Analysts / Investors on Financial Results of the Company for the quarter ended 30th June, 2024,

Kindly take note of the above. 
 
Thanking you,

For TORRENT PHARMACEUTICALS LIMITED
